title: teucrium fruticans var. pallidum
intro: Teucrium fruticans var. pallidum, also known as the Australian or narrow-leaved bush germander, is a variety of the Teucrium fruticans plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Teucrium fruticans var. pallidum include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems.
